summary: Validated requested Gemini symptom analysis upgrade and dashboard integration on public URL. Backend and frontend flows passed for live/fallback contract, high-risk severity override, chat rendering, and /chat redirect.
action_items: Optional hardening: add observability/metrics to explicitly track when Gemini fails and fallback path is used.
critical_code_review_comments: Gemini integration currently uses broad exception fallback in ai_service; this is resilient for UX but masks upstream failure details unless external logging/metrics are added.
Required keyword override behavior is correctly enforced in analyze flow for chest pain/breathing/unconscious scenarios.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created; used demo credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested checks in this review request passed against public environment. Existing prior auth hardening gaps from iteration_2 (cookie/lockout/CORS strictness) were not the target of this run and should be tracked separately.
rca of the issue: No blocking issue reproduced in this run for requested Gemini/chat features.
